certificate.description: PEM-encoded certificate data for the SSL certificate, must be valid and correctly formatted.

description.description: Defines the description of the SSL certificate, providing context or details for identification purposes; must be a string with a maximum of 63 characters.

name.description: Specifies the name of the SSL certificate, which must be unique within the project and comply with GCP naming conventions.

name_prefix.description: Prefix added to the name of the SSL certificate, used to uniquely identify the resource; must be 1-63 characters long and comply with GCP naming conventions.

private_key.description: PEM-encoded private key used to create the SSL certificate; must be valid and correspond to the provided certificate.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration allowed for create, update, and delete operations on the SSL certificate.
